steps.title: Find the contrast between impractical and practical
steps.content: The passage contrasts Kepler-452b (habitable but too distant for near-term use) with what humanity should focus on instead (planets within our solar system). The transition must signal this shift from one goal to a viable alternative.

steps.title: Choose the substitution signal
steps.content:
Instead marks the pivot from an impractical goal to a practical alternative.

The others fail to capture the substitution: For example signals exemplification, Next implies sequence, and Likewise suggests similarity.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
